description: This file implements a Kotlin-based FLAMES relationship calculator. It provides functionality to normalize names, calculate remaining letter counts after multiset cancellation, and determine the relationship category (e.g., Friends, Love, Marriage) based on the classic FLAMES method.

classes.name: FlamesCalculator
classes.description: A singleton object encapsulating methods to compute the FLAMES relationship based on two input names.

nested_classes.name: Relation
nested_classes.description: Enum class representing possible relationship outcomes with associated label and description.

methods.name: normalizeName
methods.description: Normalizes a name by trimming, converting to lowercase, and removing non-letter characters.

methods.name: remainingLetterCount
methods.description: Calculates the count of remaining letters after removing common letters between two normalized names.

methods.name: calculate
methods.description: Performs the calculation to determine the relationship type based on names, using the FLAMES method.
